title: YOga on my mind
description: A compact Desert Faith motion fragment centered on yoga as embodied practice, affection, and a small hidden skill-field.

motifMap.meaning: The body practice becomes the immediate object of attention and affection.
The post links bodily movement with a hidden linguistic or ritual competence inside the practice.

excerpt: I got Yoga on my mind. I love the act of doing it and the secret word skills in it are pretty dope wel.
